texto: I don't have a pet, but I dream of someday getting a pug dog whom I will name Croque Monsieur so that I may alternate between calling him Croque, Monsieur or his full name: Croque Monsieur. I'll more than likely only use his first and last name most often when he's been bad.
explicacao: Citação de John Gallagher sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “I don't have a pet, but I dream of someday getting a pug dog whom I will name Croque Monsieur so …” articula motivacao, dog, dream em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como dream e name.
